data.title: Crypto’s ‘golden age’, Trump wants Gaza control, Enron’s return
data.description:
BTC lower despite Sacks call for crypto ‘golden age’. BTC excellent store of value: Sacks. Senate sees stablecoin bill introduced. FTX payouts to begin on Feb 18. SEC to dial down crypto oversight. People can buy tokens at their own risk: SEC. Regulation by enforcement is out at CFTC: Pham. ETH/BTC at 5-year low, supply above Merge levels. XRP ledger back online after 1hr network halt. Ohio...
source: https://decrypt.co/videos/interviews/dZzSEa7N/cryptos-golden-age-trump-wants-gaza-control-enrons-return

data.title: Alchemy Pay acquires Korea Electronic Financial Business registration
data.description:

data.title: Live hearing coverage – Investigating the real impacts of debanking in America
data.description:
The US Senate Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs is holding a hearing this Wednesday. The committee is examining allegations that financial institutions have unfairly denied banking services to citizens and businesses associated with the crypto industry.  The “Investigating the Real Impacts of Debanking in America” hearing features testimonies from Anchorage Digital CEO Nathan...
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/investigating-impacts-of-debanking-america/

data.title: SEC transfers top crypto litigator Jorge Tenreiro to IT department
data.description:
Jorge Tenreiro, the SEC’s top crypto hitman, just got pulled off the legal department. He’s now stuck in the agency’s IT department, buried somewhere under server maintenance and software updates. The transfer happened last week, right as the SEC scrambles to make peace with the same crypto companies it spent years dragging through courtrooms, according […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sec-transfers-litigator-jorge-tenreiro-to-it/

data.title: Cardano Faces Pressure as Whales Scale Back and Bearish Sentiment Grows
data.description:
Cardano's largest investors, often referred to as ADA whales, have been scaling back their trading activity, indicating a shift in sentiment around the altcoin.
The post Cardano Faces Pressure as Whales Scale Back and Bearish Sentiment Grows appeared first on Cryptodnes.
source: https://cryptodnes.bg/en/cardano-faces-pressure-as-whales-scale-back-and-bearish-sentiment-grows/

data.title: FDIC Releases Trove of 'Operation Chokepoint 2.0' Crypto Documents
data.description:
Crypto advocates claimed the documents showed further proof that the FDIC had targeted the crypto industry.
source: https://decrypt.co/304559/fdic-operation-chokepoint-crypto-documents

data.title: BlackRock plans bitcoin exchange-traded product for European market: report
data.description:
Following the success of its U.S.-based spot Bitcoin ETF, BlackRock is now preparing a BTC-based fund to be listed in Europe.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/339033/blackrock-plans-bitcoin-exchange-traded-product-for-european-market-report?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: BlackRock Expected to Launch Bitcoin Spot ETP in Europe
data.description:
BlackRock is preparing to introduce a Bitcoin Spot Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) in Europe, marking a significant expansion of its cryptocurrency offerings beyond the United States.
The post BlackRock Expected to Launch Bitcoin Spot ETP in Europe appeared first on Cryptodnes.
source: https://cryptodnes.bg/en/blackrock-expected-to-launch-bitcoin-spot-etf-in-europe/

data.title: Right-wing X account followed by Elon Musk shilled Indian memecoin
data.description:
Inevitable West was caught shilling a Hindu-themed memecoin yesterday despite apologizing for a previous memecoin rugpull.
The post Right-wing X account followed by Elon Musk shilled Indian memecoin appeared first on Protos.
source: https://protos.com/right-wing-x-account-followed-by-elon-musk-shilled-indian-memecoin/
